about.short: With over 12 years of experience, I have guided thousands of people through life’s uncertainties using traditional Vedic astrology.
about.long: My approach is rooted in authentic Kerala astrology practices passed down through my guru. I believe astrology is not just prediction, but guidance to help you move forward with clarity and confidence.

services.title: Marriage Consultation
services.problem: Facing delays or repeated obstacles in marriage?
services.solution: Detailed horoscope analysis to identify planetary causes and suggest remedies.
services.prefill: I need help with marriage issues

services.title: Career Guidance
services.problem: Confused about job change or career direction?
services.solution: Astrological insights to guide your career decisions with clarity.
